tasks.subject: Task 0: R9 브랜치 + spec §10 R9 체크리스트 확장 + plan + tasks.json + Decision Log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `rolestra-phase-r9` 브랜치 main tip(`3cf32ad`)에서 분기. spec §10 Phase R9 블록을 R3~R8 템플릿(체크박스 + 산출물 링크)으로 확장 — 13 구현 체크박스 + scope 경계. Decision Log 8건(D1~D8) 기록. tasks.json 14-slot skeleton.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-rolestra-phase-r9.md, docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-rolestra-phase-r9.md.tasks.json, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 Phase R9만)

**Verify:** `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD` == rolestra-phase-r9

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-rolestra-phase-r9.md","docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-23-rolestra-phase-r9.md.tasks.json","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD","acceptanceCriteria":["rolestra-phase-r9 브랜치 생성","Decision Log에 D1~D8 8건 기록","§10 Phase R9 체크박스+산출물 템플릿 확장","tasks.json 14-slot skeleton 존재"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared autonomy + queue + notification prefs types + IPC 채널 + zod + preload
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/shared/queue-types.ts` + `src/shared/notification-types.ts` 확정 (이미 일부 존재 — 확장). IPC 채널 `project:set-autonomy`, `queue:list/add/reorder/remove/pause/resume`, `notification:get-prefs/update-prefs/test` 를 `ipc-types.ts` + `ipc-schemas.ts` + preload 화이트리스트에 일관 선언. Stream 이벤트 `stream:queue-updated` / `stream:notification-prefs-changed` / `stream:autonomy-mode-changed` 를 `stream-events.ts` 에 추가.

**Files:** src/shared/{queue-types,notification-types,ipc-types,ipc-schemas,stream-events}.ts, src/preload/index.ts, src/shared/__tests__/ipc-schemas.test.ts (확장)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- ipc-schemas queue-types notification-types`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/shared/queue-types.ts","src/shared/notification-types.ts","src/shared/ipc-types.ts","src/shared/ipc-schemas.ts","src/shared/stream-events.ts","src/preload/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- ipc-schemas queue notification stream-events","acceptanceCriteria":["10+ 신규 채널 (+3 stream) 일관 선언","zod round-trip 게이트 green","기존 R8 채널 회귀 0","typecheck exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: AutonomyModeToggle + 2단계 확인 다이얼로그 + use-autonomy-mode hook + stream reducer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/features/projects/AutonomyModeToggle.tsx` — 프로젝트 헤더 3분기 토글 (manual/auto_toggle/queue). `AutonomyConfirmDialog.tsx` — manual → auto_toggle/queue 승격 시 Circuit Breaker 기본값 4종 안내 + 명시적 재확인 checkbox. `use-autonomy-mode.ts` hook — fetch + invoke + `stream:autonomy-mode-changed` reducer.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/projects/{AutonomyModeToggle,AutonomyConfirmDialog}.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/hooks/use-autonomy-mode.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- AutonomyModeToggle AutonomyConfirmDialog use-autonomy-mode`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/projects/AutonomyModeToggle.tsx","src/renderer/features/projects/AutonomyConfirmDialog.tsx","src/renderer/hooks/use-autonomy-mode.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- AutonomyModeToggle AutonomyConfirmDialog","acceptanceCriteria":["3 모드 토글 onClick → invoke 인자 정확","manual → auto_toggle/queue 승격 시 confirm dialog open","checkbox 없이 confirm 비활성","stream event 수신 시 로컬 state 갱신"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: QueuePanel + use-queue hook + stream reducer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/features/projects/QueuePanel.tsx` — 프로젝트 상단 접기 가능 패널. 여러 줄 입력 → 줄 단위 항목 추가 / 목록 표시 / drag 순서 변경 / 항목 제거 / pause / resume / 진행 포인터 표시. `use-queue.ts` — `queue:list/add/reorder/remove/pause/resume` invoke + `stream:queue-updated` reducer.

**Files:** src/renderer/features/projects/QueuePanel.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/hooks/use-queue.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- QueuePanel use-queue`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/projects/QueuePanel.tsx","src/renderer/hooks/use-queue.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- QueuePanel use-queue","acceptanceCriteria":["여러 줄 입력 → add 여러 번 invoke","drag 순서 변경 → reorder invoke 인자 정확","pause/resume 토글","진행 포인터 반영","stream event 수신 시 로컬 state 갱신"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: NotificationPrefsView + use-notification-prefs + 설정 surface 진입
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/features/settings/NotificationPrefsView.tsx` — 4 kind × 표시 on/off + 소리 on/off + 테스트 알림 버튼. `use-notification-prefs.ts` — fetch + update + `stream:notification-prefs-changed` reducer. 설정 surface 진입점 wire (R4 SettingsSection 또는 임시 SettingsView).

**Files:** src/renderer/features/settings/NotificationPrefsView.tsx + __tests__, src/renderer/hooks/use-notification-prefs.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- NotificationPrefsView use-notification-prefs`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/features/settings/NotificationPrefsView.tsx","src/renderer/hooks/use-notification-prefs.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- NotificationPrefsView","acceptanceCriteria":["4 kind × 2 토글 UI 렌더","update-prefs invoke 인자 정확","테스트 알림 버튼 → notification:test invoke","stream event 수신 반영"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: AutonomyGate — ApprovalService.create 시 autonomyMode 분기 (manual/auto/queue)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/main/autonomy/autonomy-gate.ts` — ApprovalService 'created' 이벤트 구독, 연결된 project 의 autonomyMode 조회, (a) manual: 기본 흐름 유지 (approval_item 유지), (b) auto_toggle/queue: 특정 kind + outcome 조건 (mode_transition 의 target=auto/hybrid, consensus_decision 의 accepted 결과) 만 자동 accept + `#회의록` 채널에 audit trace + NotificationService.show('work_done'). 실패 조건 (review_outcome=rework/fail, cli_spawn_failed 등) 은 강제 manual 다운그레이드 + CircuitBreaker 없이도 승격 roll-back.

**Files:** src/main/autonomy/autonomy-gate.ts + __tests__, src/main/approvals/approval-service.ts (hook-in), src/main/index.ts (wire)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- autonomy-gate approval-service`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/autonomy/autonomy-gate.ts","src/main/approvals/approval-service.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- autonomy-gate","acceptanceCriteria":["manual: approval_item 생성 + 기존 흐름 (회귀 0)","auto_toggle: accepted kind 자동 decide('accepted')","fail/rework: 강제 manual 다운그레이드","#회의록 trace 포스트"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Circuit Breaker 실 이벤트 feed (4 tripwire) + on('fired') downgrade handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ExecutionService `dryRunApply` 직후 `circuitBreaker.recordFileChanges(n)`, CliRunner `spawn` 완료 시 `recordCliElapsed(ms)`, QueueService `startNext` 시 `recordQueueStart`, MeetingTurnExecutor/ApprovalService 실패 시 `recordError(cat)`. `circuitBreaker.on('fired')` → ProjectService.setAutonomy('manual') + `approval_item` (category=circuit_breaker) + NotificationService.show('error', { reason }) — v3-side-effects.ts 의 breakerHandler 완성.

**Files:** src/main/execution/execution-service.ts, src/main/providers/cli-runner.ts, src/main/queue/queue-service.ts, src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts, src/main/engine/v3-side-effects.ts + __tests__

**Verify:** `npm run test -- circuit-breaker v3-side-effects execution-service cli-runner`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/engine/v3-side-effects.ts","src/main/execution/execution-service.ts","src/main/providers/cli-runner.ts","src/main/queue/queue-service.ts","src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-turn-executor.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- circuit-breaker v3-side-effects","acceptanceCriteria":["4 tripwire 각각 실 이벤트 소스에서 record 호출","fired 시 ProjectService.setAutonomy('manual') 호출 확인","approval_item category=circuit_breaker 생성","notification.show('error', {reason})"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Queue run loop — auto-start next + 재시작 복구 + pause/resume + stream emit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** QueueService 가 meeting onFinal 직후 `startNext()` 호출 (autonomyMode=queue 인 경우). 앱 재시작 시 `status='in_progress'` 항목을 `pending` 으로 롤백 + `attempts` 유지 (복구). pause/resume 정합성. `stream:queue-updated` emit 완성. 이미 있는 구조 확장.

**Files:** src/main/queue/queue-service.ts + __tests__, src/main/index.ts (recovery hook), src/main/queue/queue-repository.ts (소폭 확장)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- queue-service queue-repository`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/queue/queue-service.ts","src/main/queue/queue-repository.ts","src/main/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- queue-service","acceptanceCriteria":["queue 모드 onFinal → startNext 호출","재시작 recovery rollback 검증","pause 중 startNext 호출 없음","stream:queue-updated 발사"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: MeetingOrchestrator.onFinal → #회의록 요약 포스트 + NotificationService.show(work_done)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** v3-side-effects.ts 의 work-done handler 완성. MeetingOrchestrator onFinal 이벤트에서 (a) `#회의록` 채널에 메타 헤더 + 요약 원문 자동 포스트 (R6 와 동일 포맷), (b) NotificationService.show('work_done', { projectId, meetingTitle }) (모든 autonomyMode 공통), (c) auto_toggle/queue 일 때만 `#일반` 채널에 완료 알림 system message 추가 (spec §8).

**Files:** src/main/engine/v3-side-effects.ts + __tests__, src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts (wire 확인)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- v3-side-effects meeting-orchestrator`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/engine/v3-side-effects.ts","src/main/meetings/engine/meeting-orchestrator.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- v3-side-effects","acceptanceCriteria":["onFinal → #회의록 메시지 append 확인","notification.show('work_done') 호출","auto_toggle/queue 에서만 #일반 system message"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Production wiring — setNotificationServiceAccessor + setQueueServiceAccessor + streamBridge.connect({queue}) + prefs seed
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R8 Task 8 패턴. main/index.ts 에서 `setNotificationServiceAccessor(() => notificationService)` + `setQueueServiceAccessor(() => queueService)` 호출. `streamBridge.connect({ ..., queue: queueService })` (현재 주석 `queue connect in R9`). NotificationPrefsRepository 기본값 4 kind × display/sound=true 로 seed (최초 부팅). notification-handler / queue-handler production 에서 throw 0.

**Files:** src/main/index.ts, src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts, src/main/notifications/notification-repository.ts (seed), src/main/__tests__/r9-boot.test.ts 또는 r2-integration-smoke 확장

**Verify:** `npm run test -- r9-boot handlers-v3 r2-integration-smoke`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/index.ts","src/main/streams/stream-bridge.ts","src/main/notifications/notification-repository.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- r9-boot","acceptanceCriteria":["notification:get-prefs production throw 0","queue:list production throw 0","streamBridge queue 연결 확인","prefs 초기 4 kind seed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: R8 인수인계 통합 — 외근 자동 timeout 1h + MemberWarmupService backoff retry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** (a) MemberProfileService 가 `status_override='offline-manual'` 일 때 마지막 변경 시각 + autonomy 기본 timeout (60분, settings 조정 가능) 를 체크하여 자동 `online` 복귀 (backend timer or getWorkStatus 지연 평가). (b) MemberWarmupService 가 timeout 실패한 provider 에 대해 10s → 30s → 60s 지수 backoff 재시도 (최대 3회). provider.warmup abort signal 지원 여부 문서화 (R10 deferred).

**Files:** src/main/members/member-profile-service.ts, src/main/members/member-warmup-service.ts + __tests__, src/shared/member-profile-types.ts (settings 기본값)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- member-profile-service member-warmup-service`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/main/members/member-profile-service.ts","src/main/members/member-warmup-service.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- member-profile-service member-warmup-service","acceptanceCriteria":["60분 경과 offline-manual → online 자동 복귀","warmup 실패 3회까지 backoff retry","retry 모두 실패 시 offline-connection 확정","회귀 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: i18n populate notification.* / autonomy.* / queue.* / circuitBreaker.* / settings.notifications.*
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ko/en 신규 키 populate. `notification.*` (main-process 라벨 — R7/R8 에서 deferred 됐던 4 kind 고정 title/body + `notification.warmupFailed.*` + `notification.circuitBreaker.*`). `autonomy.mode.*` (3 라벨) / `autonomy.confirm.*` (dialog) / `autonomy.downgrade.*` (Circuit Breaker 발동 안내). `queue.panel.*` / `queue.toast.*` / `queue.recovery.*`. `circuitBreaker.tripwire.*` (4 종 + reason). `settings.notifications.*`. i18next-parser keepRemoved regex 확장.

**Files:** src/renderer/i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json, i18next-parser.config.js

**Verify:** `npm run i18n:check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/i18n/locales/ko.json","src/renderer/i18n/locales/en.json","i18next-parser.config.js"],"verifyCommand":"npm run i18n:check","acceptanceCriteria":["ko/en 신규 키 populate (parser idempotent)","i18n:check exit 0","typecheck:web exit 0","notification.* main-process 라벨 populate"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Playwright E2E autonomy-queue-flow.spec.ts (2단계 확인 → auto accept → queue → circuit breaker)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** spec §11 시나리오 — (a) 프로젝트 헤더에서 auto_toggle 승격 → 2단계 확인 다이얼로그 → 확인 → 모드 전환 mode_transition 자동 accept, (b) QueuePanel 에 2 항목 추가 → 첫 항목 시작 → 완료 시 `#일반` 알림 + 다음 항목 자동 시작, (c) Circuit Breaker `files_per_turn > 20` 모의 → 강제 manual 다운그레이드 + OS 알림 발사 (Electron Notification mock). WSL 제약 시 R4~R8 와 동일 DONE_WITH_CONCERNS.

**Files:** e2e/autonomy-queue-flow.spec.ts, e2e/helpers/mock-provider.ts (재사용)

**Verify:** `npx playwright test autonomy-queue-flow` 또는 DONE_WITH_CONCERNS

```json:metadata
{"files":["e2e/autonomy-queue-flow.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npx playwright test autonomy-queue-flow","acceptanceCriteria":["spec 3 단계 시나리오 존재","typecheck/lint exit 0","WSL 제약 시 DONE_WITH_CONCERNS 정책"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: R9 Closeout — typecheck/lint/test/i18n/theme/build + done-checklist + tasks 14/14
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 모든 정식 게이트 녹색. `docs/superpowers/specs/r9-done-checklist.md` 작성 (14 산출물 + Known Concerns + Decision Log). spec §10 R9 [ ] → [x]. tasks.json 14/14 completed.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/specs/r9-done-checklist.md, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 R9), tasks.json
